message:
test(cass,contracts): add export rejection test and harden contract verification

- cass_integration.rs: New test cass_export_content_rejects_unexported_
  fallback_identifier verifying that a session with an explicit
  session_id cannot be resolved via its synthetic row-ID identifier.
  This exercises the guard added in the previous cass.rs fix.

- vendored_async_contract_integration.rs: Minor rustfmt normalization
  of the assert! macro call formatting.

- vendored_async_contract_verification.rs: Fix v12 error mapping test
  to accept either #[from] derive attributes or explicit From impl
  blocks (using .contains() returning bool instead of .matches().count()
  returning usize). Fix v14 backpressure test to match the actual field
  visibility (pool: PoolConfig instead of pub pool: PoolConfig). Rustfmt
  normalization of import ordering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
